questions.question: Name all 5 main abbreviations from your setup process
questions.hint: They cover: basic setup, the lint group (biome/eslint and testing/typescript), and contract

questions.question: What does main (CRI(svg)SPOD) stand for?
questions.correctAnswer: Create, Repo/Removes, Install, Scripts, Ports, Output, Deps
acceptableVariations: Create, Repo + Removes, (Install, Invoke, Ignore), Scripts, Ports, Output, Deps
Create, Repo + Removes, Install, Scripts, Ports, Output, Deps
Create, Repo/Removes, (Install, Invoke, Ignore), Scripts, Ports, Output, Deps

What does 'D' stand for in B(E)DS(TCP)? What tools does B(E)DS(TCP) / (E)PRAWN relate to?

What does TOT(S) stand for? What topics does this abbreviation pair relate to? (What other abbreviation pair is in the same group?)
What does RUN FUCT stand for? Which abbreviation is it associated with? What topics do they relate to?
questions.correctAnswer: Repo, Upgrade biome, Null, Floating no, Unreachable, Casing, Tsreset

questions.correctAnswer: Use @repo over @workspace, tsUp, Scripts, TSConfig(ROOT ROCE)
acceptableVariations: Use @repo over @workspace, tsUp, Scripts, TSConfig(ROOT ROCE)
repo, tsup, scripts, tsconfig(root, outdir, moduleCommonJS, exclude dist)

questions.question: What did 'R' in RUST(ROCE) used to stand for? (Historical - what was the old meaning?)
questions.historicalNote: Previously 'R' stood for 'Repo', now it stands for 'Use @repo over @workspace'

questions.question: What does the first 'R' in RUST stand for? (Not the old 'Repo' meaning - the current meaning)
What did 'C' in ROCE used to stand for? (Historical - what was the old meaning?)
questions.historicalNote: Previously 'C' stood for 'CommonJs', now it stands for 'moduleCommonJS'

questions.question: What does 'C' currently stand for in ROCE? (Not the old 'CommonJs' meaning)
What did 'E' in ROCE used to stand for? (Historical - what was the old meaning?)
questions.historicalNote: Previously 'E' stood for 'Excludes', now it stands for 'exclude dist'

questions.question: What does 'E' currently stand for in ROCE? (Not the old 'Excludes' meaning)
What does CCDS stand for? What topic does CDW / CCDS relate to?

questions.historicalNote: Previously RTSC included 'Method', now it stands for 'Return, TSresthandler, Contract' (Method was removed)

questions.question: What did RTSC used to stand for? (Historical - the old full form including Method)
questions.historicalNote: Previously included 'Method', now it's just 'Return, TSresthandler, Contract'

abbreviations.fullForm: Create, Repo/Removes, Install, Scripts, Ports, Output, Deps

abbreviations.description: Part of the lint group (along with TOT(S) / RUN FUCT). Relates to biome / eslint tools

abbreviations.fullForm: (Eliminate ESLINT), Package, Prettier, Add Extension, Workspace, Next
abbreviations.description: Paired with B(E)DS(TCP) in the lint group. Relates to biome / eslint tools
Part of the lint group (along with B(E)DS(TCP) / (E)PRAWN). Relates to testing and typescript. The (S) is a reminder that T(S) has more steps, which are called RUN FUCT

letters.standsFor: Reminder that T(S) has more steps
letters.note: See RUN FUCT for the additional steps

additionalSteps.fullForm: Repo, Upgrade biome, Null, Floating no, Unreachable, Casing, Tsreset

abbreviations.description: Codebase structure related to contract (along with CCDS)
